Cognate Required Courses

Select one of the following ﬁnance related courses:

RDEV270

Tax and Accounting for Real Estate Development

BMGT210 Foundations of Accounting for Non Business Majors

Select one of the following architecture/design related courses:

RDEV440 Principles of Urban Design for Real Estate Professionals (Principles of Urban Design for Real Estate Professionals)

RDEV445 Essentials of Architectural Design and Construction Management for Real Estate Professionals (Essentials of Architectural Design and Construction Management for Real Estate Professionals)
